sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for NES version

special_mechanics.name: Ship Transformation
special_mechanics.description: Player can press transform button with all four ship pieces attached to convert Wing Galibur into invulnerable flaming phoenix for brief period

special_mechanics.name: Ship Separation
special_mechanics.description: Player can press transform button without all pieces to split ship pieces into triangular formation around main craft. Pieces are invulnerable while separated; main ship is vulnerable. Hit resets to singular craft.

special_mechanics.name: Power-up System
special_mechanics.description: Collecting four different ship piece capsules provides extra firepower, wider shots, and act as shields giving extra hits before death

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. Terra Cresta is a vertical scrolling shooter with emphasis on ship mechanics and power-up system rather than platformer physics. No specific movement parameters, gravity, or jump physics documented in available sources. Game primarily features flying craft movement in vertical scrolling environment.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Terra Cresta (NES)
